productDisplayName: Fila Men Clutch White Sports Shoes
description: fila shoes are crafted from Italy's materials capital Biella, for quality and optimal durability. This Clutch shoe with its high-top styling and sport shoe detailing is sure to become a closet favourite. Style this with casual ensembles or for a friendly game of cricket in the neighbourhood.UpperHigh top synthetic upper with perforations on the forefootReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace ups Padded and perforated tongue with brandingPadded innerPull loop at the heel collarOutsole reinforced onto the toe box for abrasion free comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for shock absorptionOutsoleHerringbone grooves on the outsole for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
